note: topic contains 'Pro' substring — stresses the brittle winner parser (moderator.py:40-53)
topic contains 'Con' substring — stresses the fallback winner scan
a good closing must reference the opening (closings get no transcript)

topic: Nuclear power is the safest path to decarbonization
note: decisive point lives in openings — moderator only sees closings

topic: Social media does more harm than good
note: rebuttal chain matters — con rebuts pro's opening, not pro's rebuttal

topic: Universal basic income should be implemented
